image.alt: A mountain village with herbalist tables, wooden houses, and misty cliffs
image.caption: The mortal village is small, but every path here taught your body how to survive.

image.alt: A steep mountain path rising toward the Azure Cloud Sect gate
image.caption: The Azure Cloud Sect waits above the jade steps.

image.alt: A village youth registering before the Azure Cloud Sect gate while noble candidates watch
image.caption: Names are written before the gate, and every robe in the crowd seems to weigh more than yours.

image.alt: The Azure Cloud outer sect dormitory district floating among mountains and clouds
image.caption: The outer sect rises above the clouds: dormitories, training yards, bridges, and a thousand new rivals.

image.alt: A misted lower grove with pale spirit light and quiet beast tracks
image.caption: The lower grove is close enough for new disciples, but not harmless.

image.alt: A worn cultivation manual opened under soft lamplight
image.caption: Copied fragments and borrowed manuals still cut open the mind.

image.alt: A medicine hall lined with jars, herbs, and low lamplight
image.caption: Medicine work begins with careful hands before it becomes alchemy.

image.alt: A medicine hall lined with jars, herbs, and low lamplight
image.caption: The Medicine Hall smells of herbs, ash, and instructions given twice.

image.alt: A work-focused town quarter of stone, timber, trade roads, and forge smoke
image.caption: Craft begins as practical work before it earns a sect name.

image.alt: A tense martial figure poised for a practical fight
image.caption: The arena teaches what polished forms forget.

image.alt: A misted Azure Cloud mountain vista above a sea of cloud
image.caption: At the cloud edge, the sect grows quiet enough to hear your own breath.

image.alt: A hidden cave entrance under broken road stone and dark mountain roots
image.caption: Black-Thread Hollow waits below the road like an old secret.

image.alt: A bustling riverside town with a great iron bridge, market stalls, and cultivators crossing beneath misty mountain peaks
image.caption: Iron Bridge Town sits at the crossing of three trade roads. Money moves through here before it reaches the sect.
